name: azure-usage
author: fcakyon
description: This skill should be used when user asks to "query Azure resources", "list storage accounts", "manage Key Vault secrets", "work with Cosmos DB", "check AKS clusters", "use Azure MCP", or interact with any Azure service.
description_zh: 该技能为使用Azure MCP工具管理云资源提供结构化指导。它将常见的Azure任务映射到具体的MCP命令，并涵盖身份验证方法。文档侧重于列出存储账户、管理密钥保管库机密和查询Cosmos DB等实际操作。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for using Azure MCP tools to manage cloud resources. It maps common Azure tasks to specific MCP commands and covers authentication methods. The documentation focuses on practical operations like listing storage accounts, managing Key Vault secrets, and querying Cosmos DB.

name: commit-workflow
author: fcakyon
description: This skill should be used when user asks to "commit these changes", "write commit message", "stage and commit", "create a commit", "commit staged files", or runs /commit-staged or /commit-creator commands.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析暂存区变更自动生成符合规范的Git提交信息。它强制执行约定式提交格式，检查README更新，并提供清晰示例。工作流程仅关注暂存文件，避免意外提交无关更改。
_original_description: This skill automates Git commit creation by analyzing staged changes and generating structured commit messages. It enforces conventional commit format, checks README updates, and provides clear examples. The workflow focuses only on staged files to prevent accidental commits of unrelated changes.

name: gcloud-usage
author: fcakyon
description: This skill should be used when user asks about "GCloud logs", "Cloud Logging queries", "Google Cloud metrics", "GCP observability", "trace analysis", or "debugging production issues on GCP".
description_zh: 该技能提供GCP可观测性实践指南，包括结构化日志格式、日志查询语法、告警策略设计和成本优化策略。帮助用户按严重程度、资源类型和时间范围过滤日志，并解释何时使用指标、日志或追踪进行调试。
_original_description: This skill provides practical guidance for GCP observability tasks including structured logging formats, Logging query syntax, alert policy design, and cost optimization strategies. It helps users filter logs by severity, resource type, and time ranges, and explains when to use metrics vs logs vs traces for debugging.

name: linear-usage
author: fcakyon

_original_description: Provides structured guidelines for writing Linear issues and managing projects. Includes templates for bug reports and feature requests, label taxonomy, priority levels, and sprint planning advice. Focuses on practical implementation rather than tool-specific automation.

_original_description: This skill provides unified access to search academic papers across six major platforms including arXiv and PubMed. It defines clear trigger phrases for when users need to find research papers. The skill helps researchers avoid switching between different search interfaces.

description_zh: 提供用于Web应用的Playwright测试具体模式，涵盖身份验证、文件处理、网络模拟和CI/CD集成。专注于最佳实践，如页面对象模型、弹性定位器和避免不稳定测试。包含常见测试场景的具体代码示例和可操作建议。
_original_description: Provides concrete Playwright testing patterns for web applications, covering authentication, file handling, network mocking, and CI/CD integration. Focuses on best practices like Page Object Model, resilient locators, and avoiding flaky tests. Includes specific code examples and actionable advice for common testing scenarios.

name: featbit-react-native-sdk
author: featbit
description: Provides integration guidance for FeatBit React Native client SDK. Use when adding FeatBit feature flags to React Native apps (iOS/Android), initializing the SDK, or evaluating flags in components.
_original_description: Expert guidance for integrating FeatBit in React Native mobile applications (iOS & Android). Use when developing React Native apps with feature flags.

name: autonomous-skill
author: feiskyer
description: Use when user wants to execute long-running tasks that require multiple sessions to complete. This skill manages task decomposition, progress tracking, and autonomous execution using Claude Code headless mode with auto-continuation. Trigger phrases: "autonomous", "long-running task", "multi-session", "自主执行", "长时任务", "autonomous skill".

name: codex-skill
author: feiskyer
description: Leverage OpenAI Codex/GPT models for autonomous code implementation. Triggers: "codex", "use gpt", "gpt-5", "gpt-5.2", "let openai", "full-auto", "用codex", "让gpt实现".

name: kiro-skill
author: feiskyer
description: Interactive feature development workflow from idea to implementation. Creates requirements (EARS format), design documents, and task lists. Triggers: "kiro", ".kiro/specs/", "feature spec", "需求文档", "设计文档", "实现计划".

name: nanobanana-skill
author: feiskyer
description: Generate or edit images using Google Gemini API via nanobanana. Triggers: "nanobanana", "generate image", "create image", "edit image", "AI drawing", "图片生成", "AI绘图", "图片编辑", "生成图片".
_original_description: Generate or edit images using Google Gemini API via nanobanana. Use when the user asks to create, generate, edit images with nanobanana, or mentions image generation/editing tasks.

name: spec-kit-skill
author: feiskyer
description: GitHub Spec-Kit integration for constitution-based spec-driven development. 7-phase workflow. Triggers: "spec-kit", "speckit", "constitution", "specify", ".specify/", "规格驱动开发", "需求规格".

name: youtube-transcribe-skill
author: feiskyer
description: Extract subtitles/transcripts from a YouTube video URL and save as a local file. Use when you need to extract subtitles from a YouTube video.

name: aot-guru
author: finos
description: Specialized Native AOT, trimming, and optimization expert for morphir-dotnet. Expert in single-file trimmed executables, AOT compilation, size optimization, and guiding toward AOT-compatible features. Use when troubleshooting compilation, diagnosing trimming issues, optimizing binary size, implementing reflection workarounds, or maintaining best practices. Triggers include "AOT", "Native AOT", "trimming", "single-file", "size optimization", "reflection error", "IL2026", "IL3050", "PublishAot", "PublishTrimmed", "source generator", "Myriad".
description_zh: 专注于 .NET 部署优化的技能，主要生成单文件裁剪可执行文件并指导代码向原生AOT兼容。为 morphir-dotnet 项目提供具体配置示例、F#/Myriad 指导和实用的裁剪诊断。
_original_description: A specialized Claude skill for optimizing .NET deployments, focusing on producing single-file trimmed executables and guiding code toward Native AOT compatibility. It provides concrete configuration examples, F#/Myriad guidance, and practical trimming diagnostics for the morphir-dotnet project.

name: elm-to-fsharp-guru
author: finos
description: Specialized Elm-to-F# migration expert for morphir-dotnet. Expert in converting Elm code from finos/morphir-elm to idiomatic F# while maintaining AOT compatibility, type safety, and behavioral equivalence. Use when migrating Elm modules, converting patterns, implementing Myriad code generation, or translating UI code to Fun.Blazor. Triggers include "elm", "migration", "convert elm", "translate elm", "morphir-elm", "myriad", "fun.blazor", "elm architecture".
description_zh: 专门用于将morphir-elm项目中的Elm代码转换为地道的F#代码。强调行为等价、类型安全和编译时代码生成，提供具体的类型系统映射模式和实用示例。
_original_description: Specialized tool for converting Elm code from the morphir-elm project to idiomatic F#. Focuses on behavioral equivalence, type safety, and compile-time code generation using Myriad. Provides concrete patterns for mapping Elm's type system to F# with practical examples.

name: morphir-architect
author: finos
description: Expert Morphir application architect providing guidance on AST design, functional programming patterns, IR transformations, and code generation for morphir-dotnet. Triggers include "architecture", "design patterns", "AST", "IR", "functional programming", "code generation".
description_zh: 为Morphir应用架构提供专家指导，专注于AST设计、函数式模式、IR转换和代码生成。它引用具体的知识库，并为morphir-dotnet生态系统中的F#和C#实现提供具体示例。
_original_description: Provides expert guidance on Morphir application architecture, focusing on AST design, functional patterns, IR transformations, and code generation. It references specific knowledge bases and offers concrete examples for F# and C# implementations within the morphir-dotnet ecosystem.

name: qa-tester
author: finos
description: Specialized QA testing for morphir-dotnet. Use when user asks to create test plans, run tests, validate packages, report bugs, perform regression testing, or verify PR completion. Triggers include "test plan", "QA", "regression", "validate", "bug report", "test this", "verify implementation".
description_zh: 专为morphir-dotnet项目设计的QA测试技能。提供PR验证、回归测试、功能测试和构建系统检查的具体操作手册。包含在项目Nuke构建系统中运行单元测试、端到端测试和覆盖率分析的具体命令。
_original_description: A specialized QA testing skill for the morphir-dotnet project. It provides concrete playbooks for PR verification, regression testing, feature validation, and build system checks. Includes specific commands for running unit tests, E2E tests, and coverage analysis within the project's Nuke build system.

name: release-manager
author: finos
description: Specialized release management for morphir-dotnet. Use when user asks to prepare releases, execute releases, monitor deployments, validate releases, resume failed releases, update changelog, create release notes, or manage release workflow. Triggers include "release", "deploy", "publish", "changelog", "version", "release notes", "what's new".
description_zh: 专用于管理morphir-dotnet项目的发布生命周期，包括版本选择、更新日志、触发GitHub Actions工作流和发布后验证。提供具体的准备、监控和验证脚本，并能与QA测试技能协同工作。
_original_description: Manages the release lifecycle for morphir-dotnet projects, handling version selection, changelog updates, GitHub Actions workflow triggering, and post-release verification. It provides specific scripts for preparation, monitoring, and validation, coordinating with a QA skill for testing.

name: technical-writer
author: finos
description: Expert communication craftsperson for morphir-dotnet. Master of Hugo/Docsy, Mermaid/PlantUML diagrams, and technical writing. Use when user asks to create documentation, update docs, write tutorials, create diagrams, fix Hugo issues, customize Docsy, validate examples, check links, enforce style guide, or solve communication challenges. Triggers include "document", "docs", "README", "tutorial", "example", "API docs", "style guide", "link check", "hugo", "docsy", "diagram", "mermaid", "plantuml", "visual", "navigation".
description_zh: 专门用于管理morphir-dotnet文档栈的助手。处理Hugo/Docsy配置，创建Mermaid/PlantUML图表，强制执行XML文档标准，并保持技术写作风格一致。专注于解决.NET项目的具体文档问题。
_original_description: A specialized assistant for managing the morphir-dotnet documentation stack. It handles Hugo/Docsy configuration, creates Mermaid/PlantUML diagrams, enforces XML doc standards, and maintains consistent technical writing style. Focuses on solving specific documentation challenges for a .NET project.

name: vulnerability-resolver
author: finos
description: Specialized CVE and vulnerability management for morphir-dotnet. Use when user asks to scan for vulnerabilities, fix CVEs, suppress false positives, review security reports, or manage dependency-check. Triggers include "CVE", "vulnerability", "security scan", "dependency-check", "suppress", "false positive", "CVSS", "security fix".
description_zh: 专为morphir-dotnet项目设计的OWASP依赖安全检查漏洞管理工具。提供扫描、分析CVE、创建抑制文件和指导修复决策的结构化工作流，包含清晰的决策树和命令示例。
_original_description: A specialized tool for managing OWASP Dependency-Check vulnerabilities in the morphir-dotnet project. It provides structured workflows for scanning, analyzing CVEs, creating suppression files, and guiding fix decisions with clear decision trees and command examples.

name: example-data-processor
author: fkesheh
description: Process CSV data files by cleaning, transforming, and analyzing them. Use this when users need to work with CSV files, clean data, or perform basic data analysis tasks.

name: add-cuda-kernel
author: flashinfer-ai
description: Step-by-step tutorial for adding new CUDA kernels to FlashInfer
description_zh: 为FlashInfer添加CUDA内核的详细教程，涵盖内核实现、启动器创建、Python绑定、测试和基准测试。提供了逐元素缩放操作的具体代码示例，并解释了使用TVM-FFI工具的错误处理。
_original_description: A detailed tutorial for adding CUDA kernels to FlashInfer, covering kernel implementation, launcher creation, Python binding, testing, and benchmarking. It provides specific code examples for an element-wise scale operation and explains error handling with TVM-FFI utilities.

name: benchmark-kernel
author: flashinfer-ai
description: Guide for benchmarking FlashInfer kernels with CUPTI timing
description_zh: 提供使用CUPTI硬件级计时对FlashInfer GPU内核进行基准测试的框架。支持多种后端，生成包含TFLOPS和内存带宽等性能指标的CSV报告。

name: debug-cuda-crash
author: flashinfer-ai
description: Tutorial for debugging CUDA crashes using API logging
description_zh: 该技能为FlashInfer的CUDA操作提供日志装饰器，可在崩溃前捕获张量元数据。通过记录形状、数据类型、设备和统计信息，帮助调试GPU内存访问错误和数值异常。教程包含针对不同错误类型和环境变量配置的具体示例。
_original_description: This skill provides a logging decorator for FlashInfer CUDA operations that captures tensor metadata before crashes occur. It helps debug common GPU errors like illegal memory access and NaN values by logging shape, dtype, device, and statistics. The tutorial includes concrete examples for different error types and environment variable configurations.

name: mlops-automation
author: fmind
description: Guide to refine MLOps projects with task automation, containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and robust experiment tracking.

name: mlops-collaboration
author: fmind
description: Guide to prepare MLOps projects for sharing, collaboration, and community engagement.
